_note: audit-log.sh is PostToolUse (matcher: *) and append-only: it writes a timestamp\tkind\ttool\tdetail line via somi::audit and never emits a stdout decision. These cases assert the audit-log side-effect (via the runner's per-case SOMI_AUDIT_LOG default, $case_dir/audit.log) rather than additionalContext. Every case was verified against the current, unmodified hooks/post-tool/audit-log.sh by direct invocation before authoring these cases, not assumed.
